seoTitle: Lyndside vs Lyons — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Lyndside and Lyons. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Lyndside and Lyons.
heading: Lyndside vs Lyons — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lyndside, Queensland and Lyons, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lyndside has a lower overall climate risk score (27/100) compared to Lyons (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lyndside or Lyons safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lyndside has a flood risk score of 45/100, while Lyons scores 51/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lyndside scores 23/100 for bushfire risk. Lyons scores 61/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lyndside or Lyons?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lyndside has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.98% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
